title: clematis smilacifolia subsp. andamanica
intro: Clematis smilacifolia subsp. andamanica, also known as the Andaman clematis, is a species of flowering plant in the clematis genus. It is native to the Andaman Islands and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive problems and skin infections.
